LanguageData.VEE_Hail.description: Hail reduces the accuracy of ranged weapons, extinguishes fire, and slows people down.
LanguageData.VEE_Hail.label: hail
LanguageData.VPE_RadioactiveFog.description: A Nuclear reactor's meltdown has freed a cloud of radioactive material. This fog will hinder ranged attacks until it dissipates.
LanguageData.VPE_RadioactiveFog.label: radioactive fog
LanguageData.VPE_Hurricane.description: Extreme wind will cause a slowdown to everyone not under the roof.
LanguageData.VPE_Hurricane.label: hurricane
LanguageData.VPEH_Bloodstorm.description: Mystical downpour of blood, caused by forbidden hemosage psycast. While non-hemogenic individuals are choking on blood, sanguophages regenerate hemogen and can cast psycasts without worrying about psychic heat.
LanguageData.VPEH_Bloodstorm.label: bloodstorm
LanguageData.AM_Facilities.description: There is no weather in facilities.
LanguageData.AM_Facilities.label: facilities
LanguageData.VQE_AncientSilo.label: ancient silo
LanguageData.VGE_DustCloud.description: A dense cosmic dust cloud has drifted across your sector, shrouding your gravship in particulate haze. Visibility is almost zero, and targeting systems are struggling to lock onto anything. The dust will eventually clear as the cloud drifts away.
LanguageData.VGE_DustCloud.label: dust cloud
LanguageData.VGE_ToxicDustCloud.description: A drifting cloud of highly toxic cosmic dust has enveloped your gravship. Microscopic particulates are seeping into every exposed space, corroding surfaces and poisoning the crew.
LanguageData.VGE_ToxicDustCloud.label: toxic dust cloud
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientComplex.label: ancient complex
LanguageData.VEE_DustStorm.description: A choking wall of wind-driven dust sweeps across the land, reducing visibility, slowing movement, and scouring anything left exposed.
LanguageData.VEE_DustStorm.label: dust storm
LanguageData.VEE_FertileRains.description: Unusually nutrient-rich rainfall is sweeping across the region, boosting plant growth for its duration.
LanguageData.VEE_FertileRains.label: fertile rain
